title: Double a Number Represented as a Linked List
titleCn: 翻倍以链表形式表示的数字

testcases.input: head = [1,8,9] Output: [3,7,8] Explanation: The figure above corresponds to the given linked list which represents the number 189. Hence, the returned linked list represents the number 189 * 2 = 378.
testcases.expectedOutput: [3,7,8] Explanation: The figure above corresponds to the given linked list which represents the number 189. Hence, the returned linked list represents the number 189 * 2 = 378.

testcases.input: head = [9,9,9] Output: [1,9,9,8] Explanation: The figure above corresponds to the given linked list which represents the number 999. Hence, the returned linked list reprersents the number 999 * 2 = 1998.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,9,9,8] Explanation: The figure above corresponds to the given linked list which represents the number 999. Hence, the returned linked list reprersents the number 999 * 2 = 1998.
